---
title: "Teaching"
---

**Teaching Assistance with Sections:** Intro to American Politics (Fall 2023), Intro to International Relations (Spring 2024)

**Teaching Assistance:** U.S. Foreign Policy (Winter 2024), Intro to International Relations (Summer 2022), California Politics (Summer 2022), Voting Rights Act (Winter 2022), Race & Law (Fall 2021), Domestic Politics of China (Spring 2021), Scholarly Writing for the Humanities (Spring 2020-Fall 2021)

**Mentorship:**

-   **Graduate Advocate for the Summer Training Academy for Research Success (STARS) Program** (Summer 2024): Helped organize and facilitate a 7-week research program for undergraduate students from underrepresented backgrounds.

-   **Graduate Tutor for Summer Methods Training** (Summer 2023):Organized and facilitated review sessions in methods and topics covered in the core curriculum for UCSD political science Ph.D. students
